---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Ziad-Thabet
---

## Problem
What's missing or awkward right now? (Describe the workflow gap, not just
the desired solution.)

## Proposed solution
What would you like to happen?

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought about.

## Affected module(s)
Sales / Purchases / Reports / Expenses / Online Orders / Customers-Debts /
Employees / Drivers / Auth / i18n-RTL / other

## Additional context
Anything else — mockups, related issues, business constraints (e.g. Friday
is always a shop day off and must stay excluded from shift/salary math).
